data.title: Healthcare IT Market to reach $961.26 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 14.9% from 2025's $480.49 billion.
data.description: A report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the Healthcare IT Market is expected to double in value, increasing from approximately USD 480.49 billion in 2025 to USD 961.26 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.9%. The report includes extensive market data, with 637 tables and 64 figures across 633 pages.

data.title: Improved golf tee for cold weather designed by InventHelp inventors to prevent cracking, shattering.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, two inventors from Coventry, Rhode Island unveiled THE ALL NEW GOLF TEE, specifically engineered for cold weather play. The innovative tee aims to address common issues faced during chilly rounds of golf by eliminating cracking or shattering. This new design showcases enhancements to durability, promising golfers a reliable option. The creators have high hopes for their creation, confident that it will revolutionize the golfing experience, with potential benefits for players facing challenging weather conditions.

data.title: E-Z-GO® unveils new Liberty™ vehicle for 2027 with enhanced features. Telxon Inc. to offer unparalleled ride experience.
data.description: In Augusta, Georgia on January 21, 2026, Textron E-Z-GO LLC, a subsidiary of Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT), has revealed the latest iteration of the E-Z-GO® Liberty™ vehicle set to debut in the 2027 model year. This redesigned model promises an unparalleled driving experience with a complete overhaul aimed at delivering exceptional performance.

data.title: Cherry Bekaert promotes 10 professionals to Partner, effective Jan 1, 2026, amid firmwide growth.
data.description: Ten distinguished professionals have been promoted to Partner at Cherry Bekaert (the Firm) in Raleigh, North Carolina, with the promotion becoming effective on January 1, 2026. The newly promoted partners are Scott Anderson, Paul Feagan, Daniel Gougherty, Laura Harden, Alexander Higgs, Taylor Ross, Jonathan Sawyer, and others. This move is part of the firm's ongoing growth and development strategy.

data.title: ivision achieves Microsoft Solutions Partner for Business Applications, recognized for expertise in Dynamics 365.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 21, 2026, ivision proudly disclosed their attainment of the Microsoft Solutions Partner title for Business Applications. This accreditation acknowledges the company's demonstrated proficiency in aiding clients in revamping essential business operations using Dynamics 365.

data.title: PHFA and CCG secure $65M in New Markets Tax Credits to improve PA communities.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on January 21, 2026, Commonwealth Cornerstone Group, a non-profit community development entity established by Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency, received $65 million in allocations for New Markets Tax Credits. This announcement was made by the agency today.

data.title: IPDA, Gazprom-Media Holding sign MOU to deepen bilateral ties in cultural, media collaboration in St. Petersburg.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in St. Petersburg, Russia, the International Publicity Development Alliance (IPDA) and Russian media conglomerate Gazprom-Media Holding established a significant partnership by signing a memorandum of understanding. The alliance signifies a pivotal moment in cultural cooperation between China and Russia.

data.title: NWN expands AI-powered network-as-a-service platform for modern enterprise with integrations from HPE Networking, Juniper Mist AI, and Cisco Meraki.
data.description: In Boston, NWN, a prominent managed services provider leveraging AI, revealed a broader strategy for Intelligent Connectivity. This advanced Network-as-a-Service (NaaS) solution aims to streamline and update corporate networking across various vital OEM ecosystems. By establishing profound connections with HPE Networking, Juniper Mist AI, Cisco Meraki, and Cisco enterprise and security systems, NWN introduces a fully managed, AI-infused service framework that stands out in the industry.

data.title: CS Group (OTCQB: CSDX) plan includes multi-channel sales, global logistics partnerships, and sustainable innovation for MEDUSA SDP, marking a strategic shift.
data.description: CS Group (ticker symbol: CSDX) has revealed a new sales model involving multiple channels, partnerships with global logistics firms, and a roadmap for sustainable innovation in their MEDUSA SDP product line. This strategic initiative aims to boost sales and improve product accessibility on a global scale. With this development, CSDX is poised to expand its market presence and drive innovation within the industry.

data.title: Former Alameda Research CEO set for release after 440 days in US custody, to leave halfway house this Wednesday.
data.description: Former Alameda Research CEO Caroline Ellison is set to be released from a halfway house this Wednesday after serving 440 days in federal custody.

data.title: Boardwalk Pipelines' subsidiary, Gulf South Pipeline Company, launches open season for new firm natural gas storage.
data.description: A subsidiary of Boardwalk Pipelines, Gulf South Pipeline Company, based in Houston, revealed the initiation of an open season on Jan. 21, 2026. This open season is aimed at attracting new firm natural gas storage contracts. The company emphasized the potential for expansion within its premier storage portfolio. This strategic move is expected to boost the company's capabilities and enhance its market presence. Interested parties are encouraged to participate in this opportunity to secure space in the expanding storage facilities.

data.title: NeuraLight & Teitur Trophics partner for precision biomarkers in Parkinson’s trial, granting access to brain function platform.
data.description: NeuraLight, a company specializing in precision brain function measures, and Teitur Trophics ApS, a biotech company focusing on therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases, have revealed a collaboration. This partnership allows Teitur Trophics to utilize NeuraLight’s brain function biomarker platform in the upcoming clinical trial of TT-P34 for Parkinson’s disease. This news was announced in New York, Tel Aviv, and Aarhus, Denmark. This development marks a significant step forward in the research and treatment of neurodegenerative conditions.

data.title: Karolinska Development's Dilafor signs deal with Exeltis for exclusive license of tafoxiparin drug, offering significant financial benefits.
data.description: In Stockholm, Sweden on January 21, 2026, Karolinska Development AB (Nasdaq Stockholm: KDEV) made an announcement regarding its portfolio company, Dilafor. Dilafor has entered into a binding term sheet with Exeltis, a global Women’s Health company, granting an exclusive semi-global license (excluding China and Japan) for their primary candidate drug tafoxiparin. Exeltis has agreed to finance pivotal clinical trials, development, and commercialization of tafoxiparin for labor priming. As part of the deal, Dilafor stands to gain significant benefits through sales-based milestone payments and royalties up to double digits on net sales. The agreement also includes limited upfront and development-based milestones in the collaboration between Dilafor and Exeltis.

data.title: Modine to host Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings call on Feb 5; Details: RACINE, Wis., Jan. 21, 2026 - (NYSE: MOD) - Discussing period ended December 31
data.description: In Racine, Wisconsin, on January 21, 2026, Modine (NYSE: MOD), a renowned company specializing in thermal management technology, revealed plans to conduct a conference call and webcast to review its third quarter financial performance, covering the period up to December 31.
Fear & Greed Index: 51/100 - Neutral
